content:
🚀 torlink | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a fast, simple, and private way to find and download torrents directly from the command line without any complex setup.
✨ Key Features: • Terminal-based interface • Zero setup and configuration • Curated list of reputable torrent sources • Direct magnet link and infohash support • Background download management
📖 Summary: torlink is a terminal-based torrent finder and downloader that simplifies the process of locating and downloading torrent files. It searches a curated list of reputable sources, presents results clearly, and handles downloads directly within the terminal, offering a zero-setup, zero-configuration user experience.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
